name: Walnut Filling
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Whipping Cream or Evaporated Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and powdered sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg whites to the mixture and beat well.
3. Combine the grated walnuts, whipping cream (or evaporated milk), and flour in a separate bowl.
4. Mix everything together thoroughly.
5. If using almonds instead of walnuts, add a small drop of almond extract for flavor.
Note: Use fresh nuts when baking as they have high oil content and can deteriorate quickly. For long-term storage, keep large quantities of nuts in the freezer to maintain freshness.
